  "utterance": "Empowering gamers with mental health support through a community-driven platform that combines AI chatbots and peer-to-peer mentoring.",

{
  "utterance": "Imagine giving everyone the power to own and control their own health data, anytime, anywhere. With HealthGuard, you can access, share, and manage your medical records securely and privately.",
  "title": "HealthGuard",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "HealthGuard revolutionizes healthcare by empowering individuals with full control over their health data, ensuring privacy and accessibility.
